name: Do I need a lawyer for my work-related breathing illness claim in Ogden?
description: Yes for disputes; they increase payouts substantially.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work-related breathing illness claim in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for disputes; they increase payouts substantially.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required, but strongly recommended for denials, disputes, or complex occupational cases.[1] Lawyers boost awards 20-40% via evidence handling.[1] Key factors: (1) insurer resistance; (2) pre-existing issues; (3) appeals. Most settle pre-hearing, but pros handle IME pitfalls. Free consults available. Boosts outcomes significantly.
